system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.dqt_nhap_soluong_get","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[DQT_NHAP_SOLUONG_GET]
(
	@MADONHANG NVARCHAR(200),
	@MASP NVARCHAR(200),
	@MAHTR NVARCHAR(200),
	@SOLUONG DECIMAL(18, 3)
)
AS

DECLARE @MATHANHPHAM NVARCHAR(200)

SELECT @MATHANHPHAM = masp 
FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet
WHERE maddh = @MADONHANG AND chitiet = @MAHTR

IF @MATHANHPHAM IS NOT NULL
	SET @MASP = @MATHANHPHAM

SELECT C.madonhang, C.masp, D.tensp
	, C.stt, C.mact, C.chitiet
	, C.nguyenlieu
	, C.dayy_tc, C.rong_tc, C.dai_tc
	, C.soluong_tc, C.m3_tc
	, C.soluong_donhang
	, C.slct_can

	, SUM(C.soluong_giao) AS soluong_giao
	, SUM(C.sokhoi_giao) AS sokhoi_giao

	, SUM(C.DPHSC) AS DPHSC
	, SUM(C.DPH) AS DPH
	, SUM(C.NHA) AS NHA
	, SUM(C.VAN) AS VAN
	, SUM(C.DHI) AS DHI
	, SUM(C.LRA) AS LRA

	, SUM(C.DPHSC_M3) AS DPHSC_M3
	, SUM(C.DPH_M3) AS DPH_M3
	, SUM(C.NHA_M3) AS NHA_M3
	, SUM(C.VAN_M3) AS VAN_M3
	, SUM(C.DHI_M3) AS DHI_M3
	, SUM(C.LRA_M3) AS LRA_M3

	, IIF(C.slct_can = 0, 0, SUM(C.DPHSC)/C.slct_can) AS DPHSC_PER
	, IIF(C.slct_can = 0, 0, SUM(C.DPH)/C.slct_can) AS DPH_PER
	, IIF(C.slct_can = 0, 0, SUM(C.NHA)/C.slct_can) AS NHA_PER
	, IIF(C.slct_can = 0, 0, SUM(C.VAN)/C.slct_can) AS VAN_PER
	, IIF(C.slct_can = 0, 0, SUM(C.DHI)/C.slct_can) AS DHI_PER
	, IIF(C.slct_can = 0, 0, SUM(C.LRA)/C.slct_can) AS LRA_PER
FROM (
SELECT ISNULL(B.madonhang, @MADONHANG) AS madonhang
	, @MAHTR AS masp
	, A.mact, A.stt, A.chitiet
	, A.nguyenlieu
	, A.dayy_tc, A.rong_tc, A.dai_tc
	, A.soluong_tc, A.m3_tc
	, @SOLUONG AS soluong_donhang
	, (ISNULL(A.soluong_tc, 0) * @SOLUONG) AS slct_can
	, ISNULL(C.soluong, 0) AS soluong_giao
	, ISNULL(C.sokhoi, 0) as sokhoi_giao
	, ISNULL(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'PHOSC' THEN ISNULL(B.soluong, 0) END, 0) AS DPHSC
	, ISNULL(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'PHO' THEN ISNULL(B.soluong, 0) END, 0) AS DPH
	, ISNULL(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'NMA' THEN ISNULL(B.soluong, 0) END, 0) AS NHA
	, ISNULL(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'VAN' THEN ISNULL(B.soluong, 0) END, 0) AS VAN
	, ISNULL(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'DHI' THEN ISNULL(B.soluong, 0) END, 0) AS DHI
	, ISNULL(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'LRA' THEN ISNULL(B.soluong, 0) END, 0) AS LRA

	, ISNULL(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'PHOSC' THEN ISNULL(B.sokhoi, 0) END, 0) AS DPHSC_M3
	, ISNULL(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'PHO' THEN ISNULL(B.sokhoi, 0) END, 0) AS DPH_M3
	, ISNULL(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'NMA' THEN ISNULL(B.sokhoi, 0) END, 0) AS NHA_M3
	, ISNULL(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'VAN' THEN ISNULL(B.sokhoi, 0) END, 0) AS VAN_M3
	, ISNULL(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'DHI' THEN ISNULL(B.sokhoi, 0) END, 0) AS DHI_M3
	, ISNULL(CASE WHEN B.congdoan = 'LRA' THEN ISNULL(B.sokhoi, 0) END, 0) AS LRA_M3
FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan A
	LEFT JOIN (SELECT madonhang, mact, masp1, congdoan, SUM(soluong) soluong, SUM(sokhoi) sokhoi FROM dqt_nhap_soluong WHERE madonhang = @MADONHANG AND IsInOut = 0 GROUP BY madonhang, mact, masp1, congdoan) B ON A.mact = B.mact AND A.masp = B.masp1
	LEFT JOIN (SELECT mahang, masp, SUM(soluong) soluong, SUM(sokhoi) sokhoi FROM dqt_phieugiaohang_chitiet WHERE donhang = @MADONHANG GROUP BY mahang, masp) C ON A.mact = C.mahang AND A.masp = C.masp
WHERE A.hoanthanh = 1
	AND A.masp = @MASP
	AND ISNULL(A.mact, '') <> '000'
) C LEFT JOIN tr_sanpham D ON C.masp = D.masp
GROUP BY C.madonhang, C.masp, D.tensp
	, C.stt, C.mact, C.chitiet
	, C.nguyenlieu
	, C.dayy_tc, C.rong_tc, C.dai_tc
	, C.soluong_tc, C.m3_tc
	, C.soluong_donhang
	, C.slct_can","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.dqt_nhap_soluong","dbo.dqt_phieugiaohang_chitiet","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
